news.t: BlackRock Broadens Infrastructure Product Suite with Actively Managed ETF

holdings.infoBox: BILT is an equity ETF with a total of 235 individual holdings. The top holdings are Union Pacific stock at 5.78%, Aena S.M.E. at 4.28%, American Electric Power Company at 4.26%, Xcel Energy at 3.62%, and Cheniere Energy at 3.51%.

overview.description: The iShares Infrastructure Active ETF (BILT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund providing exposure to infrastructure-related companies from around the globe. The fund seeks long-term total return. BILT was launched on Jul 29, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Broadens Infrastructure Product Suite with Actively Managed ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, BlackRock expanded its infrastructure product suite with the launch of the iShares Infrastructure Active ETF (CBOE:BILT), designed to harness the long-term growth pot...
